positive: A central, stylized depiction of a cosmic jungle meeting geometric modern art. Intricate bioluminescent flora and fauna (leaves, glowing mushrooms, stylized vines) interwoven with sharp, clean hexagonal patterns and celestial bodies (crescent moons, nebula swirls). The composition must feature a single, dominant, high-contrast silhouette of a majestic woodland creature (like a stylized fox or deer) framed by fractal, repeating mandalas. Use a deep indigo and vibrant emerald color palette against stark black and white negative space. Clean lines, Art Deco influence mixed with abstract nature, vector illustration quality, high contrast, perfect symmetry, print-ready, graphic novel aesthetic, flat graphic design.
negative: text, words, letters, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, blur, artifacts, fuzzy, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, messy, low detail, gradient, realistic photo, low contrast
